overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person nighttime walk through a neon-lit district of Night City. The player explores a street-level sidewalk, ascends to an elevated plaza with a prominent cylindrical LED building, then returns to street level continuing past industrial buildings and club entrances. The scene features heavy Asian architectural influence with Japanese signage, wet reflective streets, and dense neon advertising.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet cyberpunk street with elevated highway rail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet city street passing parked vehicles and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in white graffiti tags and street art
elevated concrete highway structure running parallel to the street
dense urban buildings covered in colorful neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera moving forward along the sidewalk. A graffiti-covered wall runs along the left while an elevated highway rail dominates the right side. Neon signs illuminate the buildings on both sides, reflecting off the wet asphalt surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with cylindrical LED building and outdoor seating

events.description: ascends stairs from street level into elevated open plaza area
turns left to explore the plaza interior and approach the cylindrical building

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to upper plaza level and entering open area with concrete benches and red outdoor chairs

notable_agents.action: person in brown jacket walking across the plaza toward the stairs
maintenance worker in orange cap sweeping debris near concrete benches

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped in large LED screens displaying changing colors
red plastic chairs and small tables arranged outside food stalls
large cyan neon arrow pointing right mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends stairs from the street into an elevated plaza featuring a prominent cylindrical building with massive LED screens. Red outdoor seating and food stalls line the left side while NPCs walk through the open concrete-tiled area. A large cyan neon arrow sign becomes visible on the left building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular plaza with color-changing LED building as centerpiece

events.description: LED screens on cylindrical building cycle through vibrant colors: green, pink, orange, yellow, blue, and red

agents.ego_description: walking around the plaza while looking up at the color-changing cylindrical building and surrounding neon signage

notable_agents.action: person in pink shirt walking past the camera toward the street stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the plaza interior, circling the cylindrical building whose LED screens continuously shift through a rainbow of colors. The environment is dominated by neon lighting from multiple signs, with scattered pedestrians moving through the open concrete space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk alongside highway with large billboards

events.description: descends stairs from plaza back down to street level
white van drives past on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs from the plaza and continuing along the sidewalk next to the elevated highway

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying 'FERVID' with silhouettes of two figures
metal guardrail separating sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The camera descends stairs back to street level, leaving the plaza behind. A large 'FERVID' billboard dominates the left side while the camera walks along a sidewalk separated from the road by a metal guardrail. A white van passes by on the road as the scene transitions to a more industrial street section.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial-commercial street with ventilation systems and hotel signage

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial buildings featuring large ventilation fans and pink neon hotel signage

notable_agents.action: person in plaid shirt walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large circular industrial fans mounted on building facade
pink neon sign spelling 'HOTEL' on building exterior

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sidewalk past industrial buildings with prominent ventilation fans and a pink neon hotel sign. More pedestrians appear, walking in the opposite direction. The elevated highway remains visible on the right while the street takes on a more industrial character.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with red neon club entrance and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking past a building entrance with bright red neon signage and vending machines in a darker street section

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the sidewalk from right to left

entered.detail: bright red neon sign spelling 'WOOZ' above a club entrance
row of vending machines with illuminated displays next to the building wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking past a building corner featuring a bright red neon 'WOOZ' sign above a club entrance. Vending machines line the wall beneath the sign. The street becomes narrower and darker, with a pedestrian crossing the path as the video concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city street up into a vibrant neon plaza and back down into a gritty industrial district. It begins by moving along a wet sidewalk flanked by a graffiti-covered wall and an elevated highway rail, where neon lights reflect off the asphalt. As the camera ascends a set of stairs, the scene opens into an elevated concrete plaza dominated by a cylindrical building with shifting rainbow LED screens, red food stalls, and a prominent cyan neon arrow. The camera then descends back to street level, passing a massive Fervid billboard and a white van before the environment shifts toward an industrial character marked by ventilation fans and a pink hotel sign. Finally, the path narrows and darkens as the camera walks past a bright red Wooz club sign and vending machines, concluding the journey in a more secluded urban corridor.
